text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and light stretching. After a quick shower, I eat a simple breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. My work schedule begins at 9 a.m., and I usually work from home until 5 p.m., with a short break for lunch. At around 6 p.m., I go for a run or do yoga for 30 minutes, which helps me stay active. In the evening, I cook dinner, read a book, or watch a TV show before preparing for bed. I believe consistency is important, so I follow this routine almost every day.
